title: PTD Mocks NUPENG Over Empty Threats To Dangote, Tells Drivers To Ignore Nationwide Strike Notice On Monday - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) has ridiculed the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) over its escalating leadership crisis, and for its lack of coordination and wisdom to peacefully mitigate the cold war between the union and the management of Dangote refinery.
